_schema.purpose: Language-agnostic field-mapping config for a fillable NYS AcroForm. Directly consumable by the Python reference engine (pipeline/form_fill.py) and, later, the pdf-lib browser client. See data/config/forms/README.md for the full schema.

field_entry.class: 'factual' (auto-fillable from the vendor profile) or 'attestation' (NEVER auto-filled — a person must complete it).
field_entry.type: AcroForm field type as extracted: '/Tx' (text) or '/Btn' (checkbox/radio).
field_entry.profile_key: factual only — the vendor-profile dict key this field maps from.
field_entry.value_map: radio /Btn only — {profile value -> export state}. Used to fill a radio ONLY when value_map_confirmed is true.
field_entry.value_map_confirmed: radio /Btn only — false means the export-state<->label order was NOT confirmed from the real PDF widgets, so the engine must route the field to the UNFILLED list (never guess a checkbox state).

extraction: AcroForm field names extracted from the committed PDF tests/fixtures/ac3237s.pdf via pdfrw (17 /Tx + 4 /Btn); regenerable with scripts/extract_acroform_fields.py. Radio value maps confirmed from widget /Rect reading order cross-checked against the golden-copy text capture source-ac3237s-substitute-w9.md. Inventory: tests/fixtures/ac3237s_fields.json. NB: the blank form ships sentinel 'unselected' defaults on its buttons (Entity Type /10, Taxpayer ID Type /4, Subject to Backup Witholding /2) — out-of-range values meaning nothing is checked; the engine only overrides the two factual radios and never touches the attestation button.

Entity Type.note: Part I item 3 radio. Export states /0-/9 bound to labels by widget /Rect reading order (top->bottom, left->right: /0 x34.8 y594 … /9 x34.8 y566) cross-checked against the golden-copy label sequence (Individual…Disregarded Entity). 'Other' has NO radio state — the vendor uses the 'Other Entity Type' text field, so profile entity_type='Other' correctly routes to unfilled.

Taxpayer ID Type.note: Part II radio. Export states /0-/3 bound to EIN/SSN/ITIN/N-A by widget /Rect left-to-right order (/0 x33.7 … /3 x397.2, single row y486) cross-checked against the golden-copy label sequence.

Subject to Backup Witholding.note: Part V certification radio. Field name kept verbatim incl. OSC's 'Witholding' typo. Never auto-filled.

Exempt Payee.note: Tax-status claim the vendor must decide — not the engine. Never auto-filled.

Certification Date.note: Signed by a person; never auto-filled.
